title: Nginx IP Rate Limit Example
summary: A simple Nginx IP rate limit example.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Paste the example into an active nginx.conf where the limit_req_zone line remains inside the http context.
Replace the sample upstream and path before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx limit_req module syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and real traffic from one client IP on a staging host before use.
